text: vLLM is a high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs. It supports OpenAI-compatible model serving for production-style deployment.
MLflow helps track experiments, log metrics, store artifacts, and improve reproducibility across machine learning and LLM workflows.
FastAPI is a modern Python web framework used to build APIs with automatic validation, type hints, and interactive documentation.
Retrieval quality in search systems can be evaluated using metrics like Recall at K and Mean Reciprocal Rank.
